function.name: read_file
function.description: Read the contents of a file from disk and return as a string.

function.name: write_file
function.description: Write content to a file, creating parent directories if needed.

function.name: list_directory
function.description: List the immediate children of a directory.

function.name: search_files
function.description: Recursively search files matching a glob pattern.

function.name: shell_exec
function.description: Execute a shell command and return stdout, stderr and exit code.

function.name: http_request
function.description: Make an HTTP request and return the response.

function.name: web_search
function.description: Search the web and return ranked results.

function.name: web_fetch
function.description: Fetch a URL and return rendered text content.

function.name: calculator
function.description: Evaluate a math expression and return the numeric result.

function.name: datetime_now
function.description: Return the current UTC datetime in ISO-8601 format.

function.name: sql_query
function.description: Execute a read-only SQL query against the configured database.

function.name: vector_search
function.description: Search a vector index for the top-k nearest neighbours of a query embedding.

function.name: embed_text
function.description: Compute an embedding for the given text using the configured embedding model.

function.name: llm_chat
function.description: Call an LLM with a list of messages and return the assistant reply.

function.name: image_describe
function.description: Describe the contents of an image using a vision model.

function.name: send_email
function.description: Send an email via the configured SMTP relay.

function.name: calendar_create_event
function.description: Create a calendar event on the user's primary calendar.

function.name: git_status
function.description: Return the working-tree status of the configured git repository.

function.name: git_diff
function.description: Return the unified diff for unstaged or staged changes.

function.name: github_create_issue
function.description: Create an issue on a GitHub repository.
